testsuite.name: com.telcoedge.charging.BalanceThroughPutBenchMark
testsuite.system-out: === Balance Deduction throughput Benchmark === Threads: 10 | ops/Thread: 100000 | Total: 1000000 -------------------------------------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------- Synchronized: 27,027,027 ops/sec (37 ms) Atomic: 3,194,888 ops/sec (313 ms) Lock: 27,027,027 ops/sec (37 ms) -------------------------------------------------------- CAS VS Synchonized: 8.5x slower synchronized wins Lock VS Synchonized: 1.0x slower synchronized wins
